ddls:
CREATE TABLE "property_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property being assessed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the assessment */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the property */,
  "land_value" TEXT /* Land value of the property */,
  "additions" TEXT /* Additions to the property value */,
  "total_assessment" TEXT /* Total assessment value of the property */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessor who performed the assessment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_assessments_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "property_type" INTEGER /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the property */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the property record was last updated */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographical latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographical longitude of the property */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., active, under construction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type FOREIGN KEY ("property_type") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the owner */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the owner is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the owner is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the owner */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number of the owner (encrypted) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value for properties of this type */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value for properties of this type */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Default tax rate for properties of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_records" (
  "tax_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the tax record */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount due */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the tax payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the tax was paid */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tax payment (e.g., paid, due, overdue) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, online, in-person) */,
  "late_fee" TEXT /* Any late fees applied to the tax payment */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Any penalties applied to the tax payment */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the tax payment */,
  "payer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who made the payment (if different from the owner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_records_payer_id FOREIGN KEY ("payer_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_records_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the property before the change */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* Current value of the property after the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change (e.g., reassessment, correction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., assessor, auditor, public user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* Current value after the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., front, back, interior) */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "thumbnail_path" TEXT /* File path to the thumbnail of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., deed, title) */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_documents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, transfer) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "transaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the transaction */,
  "witness_id" INTEGER /* ID of the witness (if any) */,
  "notary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notary (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_witness_id FOREIGN KEY ("witness_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_notary_id FOREIGN KEY ("notary_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)
